name_en: Top-tier replica [Exclusive photo M60574 Chocolate] This Zippy coin wallet is made of Monogram Empreinte leather with a raised Monogram embossed pattern. The exquisite design conceals ample space, easily fitting into pockets or handbags to hold credit cards, cash, and coins. The all-around zipper features a LV monogram pull. 11 x 8.5 x 2 cm (Length x Height x Width)
